description: Ungrounded LLM-style interior design list. It may recommend plausible furniture categories and prose, but it must not use the curated catalogue, Chroma retrieval, ABO item IDs, local product images, validated dimensions, hard budget filters, or Vastu rules.

output_policy.dimensions: may be estimated and must be marked estimated
output_policy.price_inr: may be estimated and must be marked estimated

comparison_note: FormaOS and baseline outputs are converted into data/eval/output_schema.json before metric calculation.
